---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-hero">
  <div class="about-hero-inner">
    <h2 class="about-hero-title">Gallery</h2>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="vgx-gallery-shell">
  <header class="vgx-header reveal">
    <span class="vgx-kicker">Events</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Celebration of International Women's Day at VSS Office</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </header>
  <div class="vgx-masonry">
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m1.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m2.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m3.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m4.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m5.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m6.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m7.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m8.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m9.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m10.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m11.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m12.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m13.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m14.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m15.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m16.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m17.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m18.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m19.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m20.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m21.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="event">
      <img src="images/m22.jpeg" alt="International Women's Day Celebration">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Celebration</h3><p>Women's Day</p></div>
    </article>
  </div>
  <div class="vgx-foot">
    <p>22 visuals in this collection</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="vgx-gallery-shell">
  <header class="vgx-header reveal">
    <span class="vgx-kicker">Visual Stories</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Community Protection Drive: 40,000 Masks Distributed During Covid-19 in Jodhpur-Balesar, & Barmer-Kalyanpur block.</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </header>

  <div class="vgx-masonry" id="vgxGrid">
    <article class="vgx-item vgx-wide" data-category="" data-index="0">
      <img src="images/g1.jpeg">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Masks Packed for Routes</h3><p>Distribution</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="" data-index="1">
      <img src="images/g2.jpeg" alt="">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Door-to-Door Supply</h3><p>Distribution</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="" data-index="2">
      <img src="images/g3.jpeg" alt="">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Family Receives Masks</h3><p>Community</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="volunteers" data-index="4">
      <img src="images/g5.jpeg" alt="Food Distributor">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Food Distributor</h3><p>Volunteers</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="operations" data-index="5">
      <img src="images/g6.jpeg" alt="Food">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Food distributor</h3><p>Operations</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="community" data-index="6">
      <img src="images/g7.jpeg" alt="Senior citizen receiving mask">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Senior Citizen Care</h3><p>Community</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item vgx-wide" data-category="operations" data-index="7">
      <img src="images/g8.jpeg" alt="Logistics coordination for mask delivery">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Logistics in Motion</h3><p>Operations</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="volunteers" data-index="8">
      <img src="images/g9.jpeg" alt="Mask stitching in progress">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Mask Stitching</h3><p>Volunteers</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="distribution" data-index="9">
      <img src="images/g10.jpeg" alt="Distribution queue">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Distribution Line</h3><p>Distribution</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="community" data-index="10">
      <img src="images/g11.jpeg" alt="Volunteer handing over mask">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Mask Handover</h3><p>Community</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="operations" data-index="11">
      <img src="images/g12.jpeg" alt="Health worker supported with masks">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Health Worker Support</h3><p>Operations</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="community" data-index="12">
      <img src="images/g13.jpeg" alt="Awareness session about masks">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Awareness Session</h3><p>Community</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="community" data-index="13">
      <img src="images/g14.jpeg" alt="Village meeting for mask safety">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Village Meeting</h3><p>Community</p></div>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-item" data-category="volunteers" data-index="14">
      <img src="images/g15.jpeg" alt="Group of volunteers with masks">
      <div class="vgx-overlay"><h3>Volunteer Team</h3><p>Volunteers</p></div>
    </article>
  </div>

  <div class="vgx-foot">
    <p><span id="vgxVisibleCount">15</span> visuals in this story collection</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="vgx-materials reveal" id="gallery-reading-materials">
  <div class="vgx-materials-head">
    <span class="vgx-kicker">Read Materials</span>
    <h2 class="section-title">Background Reading from the Field</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <p>Use these notes and explainers to understand the context behind the gallery visuals.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="vgx-material-grid">
    <article class="vgx-material-card">
      <h3>Mask Distribution Strategy Note</h3>
      <a href="blog.html" aria-label="Read more: Mask Distribution Strategy Note">
        <span aria-hidden="true">Read more</span>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
          <path d="M5 12h14"></path>
          <path d="M13 5l7 7-7 7"></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-material-card">
      <h3>Community Awareness Brief</h3>
      <a href="media-coverage.html" aria-label="Read more: Community Awareness Brief">
        <span aria-hidden="true">Read more</span>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
          <path d="M5 12h14"></path>
          <path d="M13 5l7 7-7 7"></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-material-card">
      <h3>Volunteer Safety Protocol</h3>
      <a href="contact.html" aria-label="Read more: Volunteer Safety Protocol">
        <span aria-hidden="true">Read more</span>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
          <path d="M5 12h14"></path>
          <path d="M13 5l7 7-7 7"></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </article>
    <article class="vgx-material-card">
      <h3>Impact Snapshot</h3>
      <a href="achievements.html" aria-label="Read more: Impact Snapshot">
        <span aria-hidden="true">Read more</span>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
          <path d="M5 12h14"></path>
          <path d="M13 5l7 7-7 7"></path>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="vgx-lightbox" id="vgxLightbox" aria-modal="true" role="dialog">
  <div class="vgx-lightbox-bg" id="vgxLightboxBg"></div>
  <button class="vgx-close" id="vgxClose" aria-label="Close image">&times;</button>
  <button class="vgx-nav prev" id="vgxPrev" aria-label="Previous image">&#10094;</button>
  <figure class="vgx-stage">
    <img id="vgxImage" src="" alt="">
    <figcaption>
      <span id="vgxCaption"></span>
      <span id="vgxCounter"></span>
    </figcaption>
  </figure>
  <button class="vgx-nav next" id="vgxNext" aria-label="Next image">&#10095;</button>
</div>

<style>
:root {
  --vgx-bg: #f0f7f0;
  --vgx-ink: #112718;
  --vgx-ink-soft: #3f5545;
  --vgx-brand: #1a5c2a;
  --vgx-accent: #c8973a;
  --vgx-card: #ffffff;
}

.vgx-gallery-shell {
  padding: 52px 24px 40px;
  background: var(--vgx-bg);
}

.vgx-header {
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto 28px;
  text-align: center;
}

.vgx-kicker {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--vgx-brand);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.vgx-header p,
.vgx-materials-head p {
  margin: 10px 0 0;
  color: var(--vgx-ink-soft);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.vgx-filters {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  margin: 0 auto 18px;
}

.vgx-filter {
  border: 1px solid #c7d9cb;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: var(--vgx-ink-soft);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.25s ease;
}

.vgx-filter.active,
.vgx-filter:hover {
  background: var(--vgx-brand);
  color: #fff;
  border-color: var(--vgx-brand);
}

.vgx-masonry {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  grid-auto-rows: 210px;
  gap: 6px;
}

.vgx-item {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: zoom-in;
  transform: translateY(26px) scale(0.96);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.55s ease, filter 0.35s ease;
  will-change: transform;
}

.vgx-item.is-visible {
  transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
  opacity: 1;
}

.vgx-item.vgx-wide { grid-column: span 2; }
.vgx-item.vgx-tall { grid-row: span 2; }
.vgx-item.hidden { display: none; }

.vgx-item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  transform: scale(1);
  transition: transform 0.7s ease, filter 0.4s ease;
  filter: saturate(1.05) contrast(1.02);
}

.vgx-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding: 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.14) 45%, rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 100%);
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
  transition: all 0.35s ease;
}

.vgx-overlay h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.vgx-overlay p {
  margin: 4px 0 0;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.84);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.vgx-item:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.09);
  filter: saturate(1.12) contrast(1.06);
}

.vgx-item:hover .vgx-overlay {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

.vgx-foot {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.vgx-foot p {
  color: #516555;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.84rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#vgxVisibleCount {
  color: var(--vgx-brand);
}

.vgx-materials {
  padding: 40px 24px 72px;
  background: var(--vgx-bg);
}

.vgx-materials-head {
  max-width: 860px;
  margin: 0 auto 24px;
  text-align: center;
}

.vgx-material-grid {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.vgx-material-card {
  background: var(--vgx-card);
  border: 1px solid #dce9de;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(14, 39, 21, 0.06);
  transform: translateY(20px);
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.45s ease, transform 0.45s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}

.vgx-material-card.is-visible {
  transform: translateY(0);
  opacity: 1;
}

.vgx-material-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 20px 38px rgba(14, 39, 21, 0.11);
}

.vgx-material-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: var(--vgx-ink);
  font-size: 1.16rem;
}

.vgx-material-card a {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: var(--vgx-brand);
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.vgx-material-card a svg {
  width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
}

.vgx-material-card a:hover {
  color: #0f4b21;
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.vgx-lightbox {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 9999;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity 0.25s ease;
}

.vgx-lightbox.open {
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.vgx-lightbox-bg {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(10, 20, 12, 0.95);
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}

.vgx-stage {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
  margin: 0;
  max-width: min(1000px, 86vw);
}

.vgx-stage img {
  max-width: 100%;
  max-height: 74vh;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 6px;
  box-shadow: 0 22px 62px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
}

.vgx-stage figcaption {
  margin-top: 10px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 10px;
  color: #f2f6f2;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.vgx-close,
.vgx-nav {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 4;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  color: #fff;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.vgx-close {
  top: 22px;
  right: 26px;
  font-size: 2rem;
  width: 44px;
  height: 44px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  line-height: 40px;
}

.vgx-nav {
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 50px;
  height: 50px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 1.4rem;
}

.vgx-nav.prev { left: 24px; }
.vgx-nav.next { right: 24px; }

.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(24px);
  transition: all 0.7s ease;
}

.reveal.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .vgx-masonry { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .vgx-item.vgx-wide { grid-column: span 1; }
  .vgx-item.vgx-tall { grid-row: span 1; }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .vgx-gallery-shell { padding: 38px 14px 26px; }
  .vgx-materials { padding: 34px 14px 52px; }
  .vgx-masonry { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-auto-rows: 250px; }
  .vgx-overlay { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .vgx-nav { display: none; }
  .vgx-material-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.vgx-item'));
  const filters = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.vgx-filter'));
  const visibleCount = document.getElementById('vgxVisibleCount');
  const materialCards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.vgx-material-card'));
  const revealBlocks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.reveal'));

  const lb = document.getElementById('vgxLightbox');
  const lbBg = document.getElementById('vgxLightboxBg');
  const lbImg = document.getElementById('vgxImage');
  const lbCaption = document.getElementById('vgxCaption');
  const lbCounter = document.getElementById('vgxCounter');
  const lbClose = document.getElementById('vgxClose');
  const lbPrev = document.getElementById('vgxPrev');
  const lbNext = document.getElementById('vgxNext');

  let activeItems = items.slice();
  let current = 0;

  const updateCount = () => {
    visibleCount.textContent = activeItems.length;
  };

  const getCaption = (item) => {
    const title = item.querySelector('.vgx-overlay h3');
    return title ? title.textContent : item.querySelector('img').alt;
  };

  function showLightbox(index) {
    if (!activeItems.length) return;
    current = (index + activeItems.length) % activeItems.length;
    const item = activeItems[current];
    const img = item.querySelector('img');
    lbImg.src = img.src;
    lbImg.alt = img.alt;
    lbCaption.textContent = getCaption(item);
    lbCounter.textContent = (current + 1) + ' / ' + activeItems.length;
  }

  function openLightbox(index) {
    lb.classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    showLightbox(index);
  }

  function closeLightbox() {
    lb.classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  items.forEach((item) => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const index = activeItems.indexOf(item);
      if (index !== -1) openLightbox(index);
    });

    item.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      if (window.matchMedia('(max-width: 768px)').matches) return;
      const rect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
      const cx = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
      const cy = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
      const dx = (e.clientX - cx) / rect.width;
      const dy = (e.clientY - cy) / rect.height;
      item.style.transform = 'translateY(0) rotateX(' + (-dy * 5) + 'deg) rotateY(' + (dx * 6) + 'deg) scale(1.02)';
    });

    item.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      if (!item.classList.contains('is-visible')) return;
      item.style.transform = 'translateY(0) scale(1)';
    });
  });

  filters.forEach((btn) => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      filters.forEach((b) => b.classList.remove('active'));
      btn.classList.add('active');

      const filter = btn.dataset.filter;
      items.forEach((item) => {
        const show = filter === 'all' || item.dataset.category === filter;
        item.classList.toggle('hidden', !show);
      });

      activeItems = items.filter((item) => !item.classList.contains('hidden'));
      updateCount();
    });
  });

  lbClose.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lbBg.addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  lbPrev.addEventListener('click', () => showLightbox(current - 1));
  lbNext.addEventListener('click', () => showLightbox(current + 1));

  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (!lb.classList.contains('open')) return;
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') showLightbox(current - 1);
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') showLightbox(current + 1);
  });

  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      const idx = items.indexOf(entry.target);
      entry.target.style.transitionDelay = ((idx % 3) * 70) + 'ms';
      entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
      io.unobserve(entry.target);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.16 });

  items.forEach((item) => io.observe(item));

  const generalReveal = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry) => {
      if (!entry.isIntersecting) return;
      entry.target.classList.add('is-visible');
      generalReveal.unobserve(entry.target);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });

  revealBlocks.forEach((block) => generalReveal.observe(block));

  materialCards.forEach((card, i) => {
    setTimeout(() => card.classList.add('is-visible'), 160 + (i * 70));
  });

  updateCount();
})();
</script>
```
